mapper.select: SELECT o.id as order_id, o.order_no, o.amount, u.id as user_id, u.username, u.email FROM orders o JOIN users u ON o.create_by = u.username WHERE o.status = 'COMPLETED'
SELECT o.id as order_id, o.order_no, o.amount, u.id as user_id, u.username FROM orders AS o JOIN users AS u ON o.create_by = u.username
SELECT o.order_no, u.username FROM orders o, users u WHERE o.create_by = u.username
SELECT o.id as order_id, o.order_no, u.username FROM orders o LEFT JOIN users u ON o.create_by = u.username
SELECT o.id as order_id, o.order_no, u.username, d.name as dept_name FROM orders o JOIN users u ON o.create_by = u.username JOIN departments d ON u.dept_id = d.id WHERE o.status = 'PENDING'
